params.description: Vertical data table appears: Toys Collected. Amy: 45, Ben: 70, Cora: 15, Dan: 30.
Vertical bar graph for Toys Collected data. Four scale options displayed below with indicators: Scale of 1, 2, and 5 marked with ❌ 'doesn't fit'. Scale of 10 marked with ✓.

beats.text: Four friends collected toys for a donation drive. Ben collected the most with 70 toys. Which scale works best for this data?
Which scale works best for this data?

validator.description: Student selected Scale of 10, correct choice for data up to 70

beats.text: Scale of 10. For data up to 70, Scale of 2 would need too many lines and Scale of 5 would need fewer, but still many lines. Scale of 10 only needs 8. Much easier to read.

elements.description: Vertical data table showing Toys Collected: Amy 45, Ben 70, Cora 15, Dan 30.
Vertical bar graph for Toys Collected. Scale options 1, 2, 5, 10 shown with indicators. Multiple choice tool active.
